title: InGame Modrinth
description: Browse and install Modrinth content directly inside Minecraft
body:
InGame Modrinth adds a Modrinth browser directly into Minecraft.

Features:
- Browse Modrinth content in-game
- Search and view project details, icons, authors, and downloads
- Install content directly from inside Minecraft
- Detect already installed projects
- Open project pages and show installed files in Explorer
- Access from the main menu and pause menu

Notes:
- Restart Minecraft after installing new mods
- Version support may expand over time
